headline: 3 Reasons We’re Fans of Philip Morris (PM)
summary: Philip Morris has followed the market’s trajectory closely, rising in tandem with the S&P 500 over the past six months. The stock has climbed by 11.7% to $178.45 per share while the index has gained 9%.
